Event.Field: Face capture has started. Follow the camera prompts to register.
Photos are being uploaded to cloud storage.
The photos finished uploading. The system is now asking the attendance engine to rebuild face data.
The attendance engine accepted the rebuild request.
Rebuild request accepted by the attendance engine.
The face database was refreshed using the latest records.
The attendance engine started successfully and is ready to use.
The face database was refreshed using the latest records.
